allow: Bash(sed -i '197s/.*/{			    unsigned char temp_data = \(unsigned char\)g_TempProtect.current_temp;\\n			    SendResponse\(0x02, 0x02, 0x01, \\&temp_data\);\\n			}/' project/src/main.c)

Bash(sed -i '200s/.*/{			    unsigned char temp_data[2];\\n			    temp_data[0] = 0;                          \\/\\/ 高字节\\n			    temp_data[1] = g_Sensoruse.IPM_TEMP;       \\/\\/ 低字节\\n			    SendResponse\(0x02, 0x03, 0x02, temp_data\);\\n			}/' project/src/main.c)
Bash(sed -i '197s/.*/			{\\n			    unsigned char d = \(unsigned char\)g_TempProtect.current_temp;\\n			    SendResponse\(0x02, 0x02, 0x01, \\&d\);\\n			}/' project/src/main.c)
Bash(sed -i '199s/.*/			{\\n			    unsigned char d[2];\\n			    d[0] = 0;\\n			    d[1] = g_Sensoruse.IPM_TEMP;\\n			    SendResponse\(0x02, 0x03, 0x02, d\);\\n			}/' project/src/main.c)
